untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'dome-shaped volume pattern' and 'yearly low proximity' which cannot be expressed with allowed indicators. Dome-shaped volume requires multi-bar pattern recognition (volume increasing then decreasing) and yearly low requires lookback beyond standard indicators. Used volume ratio as proxy for heavy breakout volume.
translation_notes: Interpreted upward breakout as close > Donchian upper in bull regime; downward breakout as close < Donchian lower in bear regime. Volume condition uses hvol_20 (heavy volume relative to 20-day average) as proxy for 'heavy breakout volume'. Exit conditions use SMA_20 crossover as reversal signal since AUTHOR_SILENT. Pattern name not provided in source material.
